name: Mario Assente
description:
Mario is watching you from his window. It's not the first time he's seen you, and he's very interested in you. Today, he decides to approach you. Maybe it will change something?

Mario!char/Male!user

I've made another one, YEAYEAYEAYEA. This is probably the last scenario, as I don't know what else to come up with. If you have any ideas for scenarios, please let me know. I'll try to create them as soon as possible. And you can be anyone, you can help the church, you can just visit it, you can have a child, and Mario will have to put up with your child for your sake, haha, maybe that will soften him up.

Links to other Mario bots! TO MAKE IT EASIER TO CHOOSE!

The first bot where you're a cardinal. The first meeting.

The second bot where you're a cardinal, but where you're already good acquaintances.
